behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names script path, pyproject.toml sections, and example flags; tests reference these same items.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug and required behavior without stating specific code changes or function names.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests call `uv_func(temp_pyproject_path)` requiring the function to accept a pyproject path argument, and also require exact command ordering like `['uv','sync','--group','dev','--extra','graphviz']`; a valid alternative fix (e.g., reading pyproject.toml inside the function without parameter change, or emitting extras before groups) would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests exec the script module, patch subprocess.run, and call uv_install_requirements to capture actual command.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests assert exact flag pairs for distinct groups/extras cases which a stub couldn't satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover group-only, extra-only, mixed, and real pyproject cases as described.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are sectioned with FAIL-TO-PASS and PASS-TO-PASS headers and descriptive docstrings.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Script filename is necessary context; no specific line/function pointers.
